text.title: Instagram Ads Playbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is audience B2C / lifestyle / DTC with IG as primary surface?

conclusion.verdict: ship UGC/creator on Reels 60%+ for cold; brand-polished for retarget
restrict to retargeting only until UGC pipeline ready

text.example: B2C beauty DTC, UGC pipeline ready → Reels-first 60%, UGC for cold.
